author: AspNetCore.Identity.CosmosDb Contributors
name: CosmosDB Passkey Management Page
description: Adds a Razor Pages passkey management page that works with AspNetCore.Identity.CosmosDb passkey endpoints. Requires AddCosmosPasskeyUiIntegration / MapCosmosPasskeyUiEndpoints to be registered in Program.cs.

RootNamespace.description: The root namespace of the target project (e.g. MyApp). Applied to the Pages namespace.
